title: Branded Types (Type Tagging)
description: Master branded types to enforce nominal typing, preventing accidental misuse of primitive-based identifiers. Implement type tagging to create distinct types from primitives, improving type safety in domain models.
objectives: Master branded types to enforce nominal typing, preventing accidental misuse of primitive-based identifiers.
Implement type tagging to create distinct types from primitives, improving type safety in domain models.
